measurements.headAspectRatio: outer head width divided by outer head height
measurements.headToBodyRatio: outer head height divided by inset body-panel height
measurements.mouthVerticalRatio: head-top to mouth-anchor distance divided by outer head height
measurements.antennaStemWidthRatio: visible stem width divided by outer head width
measurements.antennaTotalHeightRatio: head-top to antenna-tip-top distance divided by outer head height
measurements.antennaTipDiameterRatio: antenna-tip diameter divided by outer head width
measurements.eyesWidthToHeadRatio: one eye width divided by outer head width
measurements.eyesHeightToHeadRatio: one eye height divided by outer head height
measurements.eyesHorizontalSpacingRatio: eye center distance divided by outer head width
measurements.eyesVerticalCenterRatio: head-top to eye-center distance divided by outer head height
measurements.bodyFrameWidthToHeadRatio: outer body-frame width divided by outer head width
measurements.bodyInsetWidthToFrameRatio: body inset width divided by outer body-frame width
measurements.bodyInsetHeightToFrameRatio: body inset height divided by outer body-frame height
measurements.sparkleScreenSizeRatio: sparkle outer diameter divided by the smaller output dimension
